# All Giftcards

> All Giftcards lets you check balances, buy, sell, and exchange gift cards from 100+ major brands quickly and securely.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of All Giftcards services.
- [Check Balance](/verify): Verify the balance and validity of any gift card.
- [Buy Gift Cards](/buy): Purchase discounted gift cards from top brands with instant digital delivery.
- [Sell Gift Cards](/sell): Convert unused gift cards into cash via credit card payout.
- [Exchange Guide](/guides/sell-gift-cards-for-cash): How to safely exchange gift cards for cash.
- [Reviews](/reviews): Customer reviews and ratings.
- [FAQ](/faq): Answers to common questions.
- [About](/about): About All Giftcards.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach our support team.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](/terms)
